Edits to your conversation

14 changes that took your recording from 1h 47m to 1h 36m.

11m removed · 14 edits
00:00 — 04:12 False start −4m 12s

Removed the opening four minutes — you and Sarah were discussing the venue acoustics and equipment setup before getting into the topic. The real conversation begins at 04:12 when she explains why she stopped reading her own LinkedIn posts.

17:32 — 18:44 Tangent −1m 12s

Cut a tangent about a mutual acquaintance's new startup. It didn't connect back to the thread about leaving big tech and broke the momentum after Sarah's opening story.

24:18 — 24:42 Cross-talk −24s

Cleaned up cross-talk where you both started speaking at the same time after Sarah's question about your podcast guests. Kept your response, removed the overlap.

31:08 — 31:26 Pause −18s

Trimmed 18 seconds of dead air while Sarah looked up the Patrick Collison essay she wanted to reference. The audience won't miss the silence.

42:14 — 43:44 Tangent −1m 30s

Cut Sarah's story about her dad's reaction to her leaving Google. It pulled away from the framework she was about to introduce.

52:30 — 52:52 Filler −22s

Removed a cluster of "you knows" and "I mean"s — eight in 22 seconds — while Sarah was warming up to the burnout topic.

59:48 — 1:00:56 Repetition −1m 8s

Sarah repeated the same point about identity and work three times in different framings. Kept the clearest version (the second one) and cut the bookends.

1:07:22 — 1:07:57 Cross-talk −35s

Removed laughter and overlapping speech during the "three rules" segment so each rule comes through cleanly.

1:14:10 — 1:14:50 Tangent −40s

A side conversation about coffee orders. Funny, but it broke the emotional thread right before the closing reflection.

1:21:04 — 1:21:32 Filler −28s

Trimmed crutch words and false starts as Sarah was setting up the "what comes next" section.

1:28:46 — 1:29:36 Pause −50s

Cut a long pause where Sarah was choosing her words carefully. Kept the breath before her answer — that beat matters — but trimmed the silence after.

1:34:12 — 1:34:54 Filler −42s

Removed filler around your wrap-up question — a few false starts before you got to the clean version of the question.

1:40:28 — 1:41:08 Repetition −40s

Sarah restated her closing thought twice. The second version is sharper — kept that, cut the first run-through.

1:45:54 — 1:47:00 Filler −1m 6s

Cut the off-topic chatter after the actual sign-off — you both kept talking after the conversation naturally ended.

1 edit restored · Final length now 1h 37m 30s
